actions.script:
def ef = ec.entity.find("Party") def dv = ef.makeEntityDynamicView()
dv.addMemberEntity("p", "Party", null, null, null) dv.addMemberEntity("pr", "PartyRole", "p", true, ["partyId":"partyId"]) dv.addMemberEntity("pp", "Person", "pr", true, ["partyId":"partyId"]) dv.addMemberEntity("pcm", "PartyContactMech", "pp", true, ["partyId":"partyId"]) dv.addMemberEntity("cm", "ContactMech", "pcm", true, ["contactMechId":"contactMechId"]) dv.addMemberEntity("tn", "TelecomNumber", "cm", true, ["contactMechId":"contactMechId"])
dv.addAlias("p", "partyId") dv.addAlias("pp", "firstName") dv.addAlias("pp", "lastName") dv.addAlias("cm", "infoString") dv.addAlias("tn", "contactNumber") dv.addAlias("pr", "roleTypeId")
customerList = ef .condition("roleTypeId", "CUSTOMER") .list() ec.logger.info("Retrieved customerList: ${customerList}")

def ef = ec.entity.find("org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product") def dynamicView = ef.makeEntityDynamicView()
dynamicView.addMemberEntity("p", "org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product", null, null, null) dynamicView.addMemberEntity("pt", "org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.ProductType", "p", true, ["productTypeId":"productTypeId"])
dynamicView.addAlias("p", "productId") dynamicView.addAlias("pt", "productTypeId") dynamicView.addAlias("p", "internalName") dynamicView.addAlias("p", "salesDiscontinuationDate") dynamicView.addAlias("pt", "isPhysical")
def conditionFactory = ec.entity.conditionFactory
def cond1 = conditionFactory.makeCondition( conditionFactory.makeCondition( "salesDiscontinuationDate", org.moqui.entity.EntityCondition.ComparisonOperator.EQUALS, null ), org.moqui.entity.EntityCondition.JoinOperator.OR, conditionFactory.makeCondition( "salesDiscontinuationDate", org.moqui.entity.EntityCondition.ComparisonOperator.GREATER_THAN, ec.user.nowTimestamp ) )
def cond2 = conditionFactory.makeCondition( conditionFactory.makeCondition( "isPhysical", org.moqui.entity.EntityCondition.ComparisonOperator.NOT_EQUAL, "N" ), org.moqui.entity.EntityCondition.JoinOperator.OR, conditionFactory.makeCondition( "isPhysical", org.moqui.entity.EntityCondition.ComparisonOperator.EQUALS, null ) )
ef.condition(cond1) ef.condition(cond2)
def productList = ef .selectFields(["productId", "productTypeId", "internalName"]) .list()
ec.logger.info("Retrieved ProductList: ${productList}")

def ef = ec.entity.find("org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product") def ev = ef.makeEntityDynamicView()
ev.addMemberEntity("p" , "org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product" ,null , null ,null) ev.addMemberEntity("ERPGI", "org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.GoodIdentification", "p", true, ["productId":"productId"], [["field-name":"goodIdentificationTypeId", "value":"ERP_ID"]], null) ev.addMemberEntity("NSGI", "org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.GoodIdentification", "p", true, ["productId":"productId"], [["field-name":"goodIdentificationTypeId", "value":"SHOPIFY_PROD_ID"]], null) ev.addMemberEntity("HSGI", "org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.GoodIdentification", "p", true, ["productId":"productId"], [["field-name":"goodIdentificationTypeId", "value":"HS_CODE"]], null) ev.addAlias("p" , "productId") ev.addAlias("ERPGI" ,"ERP_ID", "idValue" ,null) ev.addAlias("NSGI" , "NS_ID", "idValue",null) ev.addAlias("HSGI" , "HS_ID","idValue",null) ev.addAlias("p" , "productTypeId") def k = ef.condition("productTypeId","FINISHED_GOOD").selectFields(["productId","ERP_ID","NS_ID","HS_ID"]).list() ec.logger.info(" Good List: ${k}")

def ef = ec.entity.find("org.apache.ofbiz.order.order.OrderItem") def ev = ef.makeEntityDynamicView()
ev.addMemberEntity("OI", "org.apache.ofbiz.order.order.OrderItem", null, null, null) ev.addMemberEntity("p", "org.apache.ofbiz.product.product.Product", "OI", true, [productId: "productId"]) ev.addMemberEntity("oisg", "org.apache.ofbiz.order.order.OrderItemShipGroup", "OI", true, [orderId: "orderId", shipGroupSeqId: "shipGroupSeqId"]) ev.addMemberEntity("f", "org.apache.ofbiz.product.facility.Facility", "oisg", true, [facilityId: "facilityId"]) ev.addMemberEntity("psc", "org.apache.ofbiz.product.catalog.ProductStoreCatalog", "OI", true, [prodCatalogId: "prodCatalogId"]) ev.addMemberEntity("ohis", "org.apache.ofbiz.order.order.OrderHistory", "OI", true, [orderId: "orderId", orderItemSeqId: "orderItemSeqId"]) ev.addMemberEntity("os", "org.apache.ofbiz.order.order.OrderStatus", "OI", true, [orderId: "orderId", orderItemSeqId: "orderItemSeqId"])
ev.addAlias("p", "productId", "productId", null) ev.addAlias("p", "internalName", "internalName", null) ev.addAlias("p", "productTypeId", "productTypeId", null) ev.addAlias("ohis", "orderHistoryId", "orderHistoryId", null) ev.addAlias("OI", "quantity", "quantity", null) ev.addAlias("f", "facilityId", "facilityId", null) ev.addAlias("OI", "externalId", "externalId", null) ev.addAlias("OI", "orderItemSeqId", "orderItemSeqId", null) ev.addAlias("oisg", "shipGroupSeqId", "shipGroupSeqId", null)
ev.addAlias("os", "statusId", "statusId", null) ev.addAlias("os", "statusDatetime", "statusDatetime", null)
def conditionFactory = ec.entity.conditionFactory
def cond = conditionFactory.makeCondition([ conditionFactory.makeCondition("statusId", org.moqui.entity.EntityCondition.ComparisonOperator.EQUALS, "ORDER_COMPLETED"), conditionFactory.makeCondition("statusDatetime", org.moqui.entity.EntityCondition.ComparisonOperator.GREATER_THAN_EQUALS_TO,"2023-08-01"), conditionFactory.makeCondition("statusDatetime", org.moqui.entity.EntityCondition.ComparisonOperator.LESS_THAN_EQUALS_TO, "2023-09-01"), conditionFactory.makeCondition("facilityId", org.moqui.entity.EntityCondition.ComparisonOperator.NOT_EQUAL, "_NA_") ], org.moqui.entity.EntityCondition.JoinOperator.AND)
list = ef.condition(cond).selectFields([ "productId", "internalName", "productTypeId", "orderHistoryId", "quantity", "facilityId", "orderItemSeqId", "shipGroupSeqId" ]).list()

def ef = ec.entity.find("org.apache.ofbiz.order.order.OrderPaymentPreference") def ev = ef.makeEntityDynamicView()
ev.addMemberEntity("OPP","org.apache.ofbiz.order.order.OrderPaymentPreference",null ,null ,null) ev.addMemberEntity("OH","org.apache.ofbiz.order.order.OrderHeader","OPP" , true, ["orderId":"orderId"])
ev.addAlias("OPP", "paymentMethodTypeId") ev.addAlias("OH", "orderId") ev.addAlias("OPP" ,"maxAmount") ev.addAlias("OH" ,"externalId")
orderList = ef.selectFields(["paymentMethodTypeId","orderId","MaxAmount","ExternalId"]).orderBy("orderId").list() ec.logger.info("${orderList}")

def ef = ec.entity.find("org.apache.ofbiz.order.order.OrderPaymentPreference") def ev = ef.makeEntityDynamicView()
ev.addMemberEntity("opp", "org.apache.ofbiz.order.order.OrderPaymentPreference", null, null, null) ev.addMemberEntity("oh", "org.apache.ofbiz.order.order.OrderHeader", "opp", false, [orderId: "orderId"]) ev.addMemberEntity("s", "org.apache.ofbiz.shipment.shipment.Shipment", "opp", true, [orderId: "primaryOrderId"])
ev.addAlias("oh", "orderId", "orderId", null) ev.addAlias("oh", "orderStatus", "statusId", null) ev.addAlias("opp", "paymentStatus", "statusId", null) ev.addAlias("s", "shipmentId", "shipmentId", null)
def conditionFactory = ec.entity.conditionFactory
def cond = conditionFactory.makeCondition([ conditionFactory.makeCondition("paymentStatus", org.moqui.entity.EntityCondition.ComparisonOperator.EQUALS, "PAYMENT_SETTLED"), conditionFactory.makeCondition("shipmentId", org.moqui.entity.EntityCondition.ComparisonOperator.EQUALS, null) ], org.moqui.entity.EntityCondition.JoinOperator.AND)
list = ef.condition(cond).selectFields(["orderId", "orderStatus", "paymentStatus"]).list()

import java.sql.Timestamp import java.time.LocalDateTime
def ef = ec.entity.find("org.apache.ofbiz.order.order.OrderHeader") def ev = ef.makeEntityDynamicView() ev.addMemberEntity("oh", "org.apache.ofbiz.order.order.OrderHeader", null, null, null) ev.addAlias("oh", "total_orders", "orderId", "count") ev.addPqExprAlias("hour", "HOUR(ENTRY_DATE)", "number-integer", null) ev.addAlias("oh", "entryDate") ev.addAlias("oh", "statusId")
def conditionFactory = ec.entity.conditionFactory def oneMonthAgo = Timestamp.valueOf(LocalDateTime.now().minusMonths(1)) def dateCond = conditionFactory.makeCondition( conditionFactory.makeCondition("entryDate", org.moqui.entity.EntityCondition.ComparisonOperator.GREATER_THAN_EQUAL_TO, oneMonthAgo), org.moqui.entity.EntityCondition.JoinOperator.AND, conditionFactory.makeCondition("entryDate", org.moqui.entity.EntityCondition.ComparisonOperator.LESS_THAN_EQUAL_TO, ec.user.nowTimestamp)) ef.condition(dateCond) ef.condition("statusId", "ORDER_COMPLETED") orderHourly = ef.selectFields(["hour", "total_orders"]).orderBy("hour").list() ec.logger.info("Hourly Orders: ${orderHourly}")

def ef = ec.entity.find("org.apache.ofbiz.order.order.OrderStatus") def ev = ef.makeEntityDynamicView() ev.addMemberEntity("OS","org.apache.ofbiz.order.order.OrderStatus" ,null ,null ,null)
ev.addAlias("OS" , "orderId" ,"orderId" , COUNT) ev.addAlias("OS" , "changeReason") ev.addAlias("OS" , "statusId") ev.addAlias("OS" , "statusDatetime") def conditionFactory = ec.entity.conditionFactory
def cond1 = conditionFactory.makeCondition([ conditionFactory.makeCondition("statusDatetime",org.moqui.entity.EntityCondition.ComparisonOperator.GREATER_THAN_EQUAL_TO,"2026-05-01"), conditionFactory.makeCondition("statusDatetime",org.moqui.entity.EntityCondition.ComparisonOperator.LESS_THAN_EQUAL_TO ,"2026-06-01") ,conditionFactory.makeCondition("statusId",org.moqui.entity.EntityCondition.ComparisonOperator.EQUALS,"ITEM_CANCELLED")], org.moqui.entity.EntityCondition.JoinOperator.AND)
ef.condition(cond1) cancelItemCount = ef.selectFields(["OrderId","changeReason"]).list() ec.logger.info("${cancelItemCount}")
